author: lOrm
content: Gap issues filed from spec extraction: #636 (server pool — performance-critical, OC spawns fresh server per call), #638 (DiagnosticRegistry), #640 (PassiveFeedback), #643 (LocationLink handling), #644 (gitignore filtering), #645 (5 missing operations), #647 (isFileOpen deduplication), #648 (10MB file size guard), #650 (isLspConnected gate), #651 (workspace/configuration reverse-request handler). Total: 10 gap issues.
